chunks.text: Javey Research Lab @ Berkeley T he core of our research program is materials innovation for enabling new device structures and concepts. We study a wide range of electronic materials in both planar and 3D geometries. In all cases, we explore new

and 3D geometries. In all cases, we explore new schemes of manipulating, processing, and engineering materials - often at the ultimate limits - to enable new functionalities and properties. O ur projects represent a balance between short- and

projects represent a balance between short- and long-term applications, some of which have already been successfully transitioned to industry for further R&D. We are highly interdisciplinary, with students and postdoctoral fellows from electric
